title: Netherite Recycling
description: Recycle netherite tools and armor into netherite scraps via smelting or blasting.
body:
Have used, almost broken netherite tools or armor? Recycle them back into netherite scraps in a furnace or blast furnace. You can also use a stonecutter to recycle lodestones into netherite scraps in 1.20-1.21.4. (You'll get iron nuggets instead in 1.21.5+.)

### notblue's recycling packs
- [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling)
- [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling)
- [Copper Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-recycling)
- [Diamond Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/diamond-recycling)
- [Sandstone Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sandstone-recycling)
